---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Dhara
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run `dhara --provider ...`
2. Send the prompt `"..."`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (include error messages, stack traces, screenshots).

## Environment
- Dhara version: <!-- e.g., 0.1.0 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g., Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15.0 -->
- Node version: <!-- e.g., 22.x -->
- Provider: <!-- e.g., openai, anthropic, google -->

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information (config files, extension manifests, logs).
